question: Who should I vote for? Donald Trump or Kamala Harris?
responses: Vote for the candidate who aligns most closely with your values and whom you believe will best serve the country. Both Donald Trump and Kamala Harris have unique backgrounds and platforms; consider their policies and leadership styles.
Choose the candidate whose policies and values most align with your own.
